what: Review 006: consumer pipeline operability and maintainer autonomy across real consumers (worldbuilding, personal_data, home-lab, demo) and in-repo dogfood (project_memory, domain_contracts).
usage: Answers whether a human maintainer can understand and operate consumer pipelines without AI; inventories repo/version state, all consumer pipelines and plugins; finds duplicated validate_references rule blocks as primary friction; proposes the rules_path shared-ruleset slice.
